authority.scope: prospective power recomputation on the verified as-built registry only

candidate.requested_surface: automatic scalar-RMSE CatBoost depth when depth is None

spent_sizing_inputs.use: only the two changed low-density regression group profiles and their coordinates
only the three spent season-cluster profiles and their nested target coordinates

panel_template.weight_coverage: every lineage supplies ordinary coordinates 0/2 and nonuniform-weight coordinate 1
panel_template.identity_status: all 32 concrete identities loaded and verified before this power design

effect_scenario.derivation: unchanged v1 method: geometric spent effect and log dispersion from five complete changed-lane development clusters, then multiply each log-scale effect component by the retained fraction
effect_scenario.selection_bias_warning: the spent inputs selected this candidate and are not independent evidence of its true effect
effect_scenario.primary_interpretation: scale every spent log effect and within-lineage deviation to 20 percent of its observed magnitude; this joint shrinkage is a sizing alternative, not a conservative bound or quality estimate
effect_scenario.high_density_transport_warning: the DarkoFit sizing profiles exercised depth_4; applying the same structured alternative to depth_8 is a prospective planning assumption, not DarkoFit evidence, and the fresh branch-direction gate prevents depth_4 from carrying depth_8
effect_scenario.cap_interpretation: power is conditional on a candidate whose true lineage effects satisfy the intended unguarded Tier-D harm envelope; observed panels still face the 1.02 worst-lineage gate

execution_contract_requirements: owner freeze review after this as-built power result
design and execution freeze together over these exact 32 verified identities
exact candidate and control pins with byte-identical candidate verification
paired fresh workers and the already-attested row/group splits
the same cluster bootstrap, aggregate, branch, concentration, and harm rules implemented by the final analyzer
harm-justified fit, prediction, and process-tree RSS budgets frozen before launch
create-only launch, raw, result, and terminal artifacts with no rerun
no default, merge, release, or product claim unless every quality, cost, and integrity gate passes
